data.title: Dial A Vet & Pawssum team up for Australia's 1st hybrid vet network, offering seamless online-to-in-home care.
data.description: In Brisbane, Australia, Dial A Vet, the nation's fastest-growing veterinary telehealth platform, has partnered with Pawssum Mobile Vets, the largest mobile vet service, to introduce Australia's inaugural fully integrated online-to-in-home veterinary care pathway. This initiative aims to connect digital guidance with in-person treatment, providing Australian pet owners with a smooth veterinary journey. This collaboration ensures immediate access to veterinary advice and services to address pet health concerns effectively.

Telsey Advisory Group increases Dollar General’s price target to $130, up from $123.

data.title: 21Shares co-founder predicts Bitcoin won't hit new high like in January; decline not crypto-related; unlikely surge in 2022.
data.description: According to Ophelia Snyder, co-founder of 21Shares, the recent decrease in Bitcoin's value is not primarily related to cryptocurrency-specific factors. Despite this, she believes that Bitcoin is unlikely to experience a significant increase in value at the beginning of next year.

data.title: XRP sentiment hits all-time low, could trigger rally: Santiment. Social sentiment drops to Oct levels, entering fear zone, setting up potential rally ahead.
data.description: According to data from Santiment, social sentiment surrounding XRP has plummeted to its lowest point since October, dipping into the fear zone. However, historical analysis indicates that similar drops in sentiment have been followed by a rally in the price of XRP. This suggests that despite the current negative sentiment, there may be potential for a price increase in the near future.
ASX 200 index closes up 0.2% at 8,634.60 points.

data.title: EU initiates antitrust probe into Meta's updated AI policy for WhatsApp, excluding Italy. Italy's competition authority investigates separately.
data.description: Italy is excluded from the EU Commission's investigation into Meta, as the country's competition authority is already conducting independent proceedings.
